skill.name: planning-action
skill.description: Turns committed goals into clear execution plans with phases, milestones, dependencies, risks, and validation checkpoints.
skill.summary: Create phased action plans from decisions, goals, roadmaps, or rollout needs.
skill.author: BellaBe

security_audit.summary: The static analyzer flagged SKILL.md line 3 as a weak cryptographic algorithm, but the line is only a natural language description of planning use cases. No scripts, network behavior, filesystem access, external commands, prompt injection text, or data exfiltration intent were found in the reviewed skill file.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
low_findings.description: The flagged text at SKILL.md line 3 says the skill is used for roadmaps, timelines, phased plans, and execution sequences. It does not mention or implement cryptography, so the static finding is dismissed as a false positive.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The exact flagged line is plain descriptive metadata, not executable code or cryptographic configuration. The file contains only planning instructions and no code paths where a weak algorithm could be used.

content.value_statement: Teams often leave decisions without a clear path to execution. This skill turns a goal into phases, milestones, dependencies, risks, and checkpoints.
actual_capabilities: Restates a goal and its constraints before planning.
Breaks execution into phases with milestones.
Identifies dependencies that can block progress.
Keeps validation checkpoints at a high level.
limitations: It does not make the strategic decision for the user.
It does not replace detailed project management software.
It does not create repeatable operating procedures.
It depends on the goal, constraints, and context supplied by the user.

use_cases.title: Product launch roadmap
use_cases.description: Create a phased rollout plan with milestones, dependencies, and launch risks.

use_cases.title: Implementation timeline
use_cases.description: Turn an approved technical decision into an execution sequence for delivery teams.

use_cases.title: Operational change plan
use_cases.description: Plan a process change with scope boundaries, checkpoints, and contingency actions.

prompt_templates.title: Basic action plan
prompt_templates.prompt: Create an action plan for this goal: [goal]. Include goal, scope, phases, dependencies, risks, and checkpoints.
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner planning for a clearly stated goal.

prompt_templates.title: Timeline with constraints
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a phased plan for [goal] under these constraints: [constraints]. Show milestones, dependencies, risks, and validation checkpoints.
prompt_templates.scenario: Planning when time, staffing, budget, or policy limits matter.

prompt_templates.title: Rollout plan
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a rollout plan for [initiative]. Define scope, non-scope, phases, milestones, dependencies, risks, and contingency options.
prompt_templates.scenario: Coordinating a launch, migration, or organizational change.

prompt_templates.title: Advanced execution sequence
prompt_templates.prompt: Convert this decision into an execution plan: [decision]. Include assumptions, scope boundaries, phased work, dependencies, risks, owners by role, and checkpoints.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced planning after leadership or team commitment.

output_examples.input: Plan a beta launch for a new analytics dashboard.
output_examples.output: The output would define launch goals, exclude post-beta expansion, sequence preparation through release, identify data and support dependencies, and list launch risks.

output_examples.input: Create a migration timeline for moving documentation to a new platform.
output_examples.output: The output would describe migration phases, content audit milestones, approval dependencies, rollback risks, and checkpoints for quality review.

output_examples.input: Turn an approved hiring process change into a rollout plan.
output_examples.output: The output would clarify the process change, define non-scope, phase communications and training, name policy dependencies, and include contingency options.

best_practices: Provide the goal, deadline, constraints, and known stakeholders.
State what is already decided before asking for a plan.
Review dependencies and risks before assigning owners or dates.
anti_patterns: Using the skill for open-ended advice without a committed direction.
Asking it to create detailed standard operating procedures.
Providing a vague goal without constraints, scope, or success criteria.

faq.question: What does this skill produce?
faq.answer: It produces a structured execution plan with goal, scope, phases, dependencies, risks, and checkpoints.

faq.question: Can it create detailed task tickets?
faq.answer: It can outline work at a planning level, but it is not designed for detailed ticket writing.

faq.question: When should I use this instead of a procedure skill?
faq.answer: Use it when planning a one-time execution path, not when documenting a repeatable process.

faq.question: Does it choose priorities for me?
faq.answer: It can organize a chosen goal, but the user should provide priorities and constraints.

faq.question: Can it handle roadmaps and timelines?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill is intended for roadmaps, rollout plans, timelines, phases, and execution sequences.

faq.question: Which AI tools can use it?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
